narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for AI-specific hardware, particularly GPUs and high-bandwidth memory (HBM), continues to drive strong performance in semiconductor companies and related equipment suppliers.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
NVDA revenue growth slows below 50% YoY
China export controls expand to HBM

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The market for GLP-1 obesity and related metabolic drugs continues to expand, with leading manufacturers broadening their ambitions and gaining regulatory approvals for new indications.
watchFor: Unexpected safety concerns or side effects emerge for GLP-1 drugs
New, highly effective oral GLP-1 alternatives launch
Payers restrict coverage for obesity treatments

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprise software companies are seeing increased adoption of AI-powered solutions and cloud services, driving revenue growth and market optimism.
watchFor: Enterprise IT spending slowdown
Major AI software vendor reports weaker-than-expected bookings
Increased regulatory scrutiny on AI data usage

narratives.name: Semiconductor Equipment & Materials Demand
narratives.thesis: The robust demand for semiconductors, particularly for AI, is translating into strong orders for semiconductor manufacturing equipment and materials.
watchFor: Major chipmakers cut equipment spending forecasts
Geopolitical tensions disrupt supply chains for critical materials
Unexpected slowdown in foundry utilization rates

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Demand Boost
narratives.thesis: The increasing sophistication of cyber threats, coupled with AI integration, is driving robust demand for cybersecurity solutions, benefiting key players in the sector.
watchFor: Major cybersecurity breaches impacting leading vendors
Significant slowdown in enterprise security spending
New, disruptive open-source security tools gaining traction

narratives.name: Credit Services Strength
narratives.thesis: Credit services companies are expanding their offerings and receiving positive analyst coverage, indicating strong growth potential and strategic positioning in the payments landscape.
watchFor: Consumer credit quality deteriorates significantly
Increased regulatory pressure on interchange fees
New payment technologies disrupt traditional models

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Companies with strong digital advertising platforms and engaging content strategies continue to attract users and advertisers, driving revenue growth.
watchFor: Major advertisers cut spending on digital platforms
New privacy regulations impacting ad targeting effectiveness
Increased competition from emerging content platforms

narratives.name: Gold Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Gold ETFs are shining as ceasefire hopes lift market optimism, making gold an attractive safe-haven asset and a cost-effective way to gain exposure.
watchFor: De-escalation of geopolitical tensions reduces safe-haven demand
Stronger-than-expected economic data boosts risk appetite
Central banks reduce gold purchases

narratives.name: Computer Hardware AI Integration
narratives.thesis: The integration of AI capabilities into computer hardware, from servers to edge devices, is creating new demand cycles and driving growth for manufacturers.
watchFor: Enterprise hardware refresh cycles slow down
Increased competition from white-box server manufacturers
Supply chain disruptions for key components

narratives.name: Internet Retail Innovation
narratives.thesis: Companies leveraging AI and new delivery models are poised for growth, while traditional e-commerce platforms face increasing competition and evolving consumer expectations.
watchFor: Increased regulatory scrutiny on gig economy models
Major e-commerce platform reports slowing user growth
Significant rise in delivery costs impacting profitability

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Increased geopolitical tensions and defense budgets are driving demand for aerospace and defense contractors, leading to strong order backlogs and positive analyst sentiment.
watchFor: Significant de-escalation of global conflicts
Cuts to national defense budgets
Major program delays or cost overruns

narratives.name: Utilities - Independent Power Producers Growth
narratives.thesis: Independent power producers are seeing positive analyst sentiment and strategic developments, particularly those involved in next-generation energy solutions like nuclear and renewables.
watchFor: Delays in regulatory approvals for new power projects
Significant drops in energy prices
Technological breakthroughs making current assets obsolete

narratives.name: Intel Valuation Concerns
narratives.thesis: Intel faces valuation concerns and analyst downgrades despite efforts in new chip architectures, as competitors continue to gain market share in high-growth areas like AI.
watchFor: Intel announces major new AI chip design wins
Significant market share gains in data center or foundry business
Competitors experience unexpected production delays or issues

narratives.name: Auto Manufacturers Space Tech Integration
narratives.thesis: Auto manufacturers with ties to the burgeoning space economy are benefiting from the positive sentiment and investment flows into space-related ventures.
watchFor: SpaceX IPO underperforms expectations
Significant delays in space-related projects
Increased competition in the EV market

narratives.name: Entertainment Content Expansion
narratives.thesis: Major entertainment companies are seeing positive momentum from successful content releases and theme park rebounds, signaling a recovery in consumer discretionary spending on experiences.
watchFor: Box office revenue underperforms expectations for major releases
Theme park attendance drops significantly
Streaming subscriber growth stalls

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified AI Integration
narratives.thesis: Diversified banks are integrating AI into their operations and expanding strategically, while also navigating regulatory requirements and broader economic shifts.
watchFor: Significant increase in non-performing loans
Unexpected regulatory fines or penalties
AI integration fails to yield expected cost savings or revenue growth

narratives.name: PayPal Competitive Pressure
narratives.thesis: PayPal's core online checkout business is facing increasing pressure from rivals and evolving payment landscapes, leading to concerns about its market position and future growth.
watchFor: PayPal announces significant new strategic partnerships or acquisitions
Successful launch of innovative new payment products
Competitors experience major setbacks or regulatory issues

narratives.name: Apparel Retail Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Apparel retailers are facing challenges from slowing consumer demand in key international markets and intense competition, impacting growth prospects.
watchFor: Stronger-than-expected earnings reports from key retailers
Significant rebound in consumer spending in China/EMEA
Successful new product launches driving market share gains

narratives.name: Farm & Heavy Construction Machinery Divergence
narratives.thesis: The construction equipment market remains robust, but the agricultural machinery segment is experiencing a significant slump, creating a mixed outlook for diversified manufacturers.
watchFor: Global agricultural commodity prices rebound sharply
Government stimulus for infrastructure spending slows
Interest rates rise, impacting equipment financing

narratives.name: Discount Stores Resilience
narratives.thesis: Discount stores are implementing supply chain efficiencies to cut costs, but face a backdrop of low consumer sentiment and rising prices for essential goods.
watchFor: Consumer sentiment rebounds strongly
Inflationary pressures on food and gas ease significantly
Competitors report stronger-than-expected earnings

narratives.name: Medical Devices Innovation
narratives.thesis: Medical device companies are focusing on innovation and strategic investments in high-growth areas like structural heart, driving positive sentiment despite some valuation concerns.
watchFor: Increased regulatory hurdles for new device approvals
Competitive pressures leading to pricing erosion
Unexpected product recalls or safety issues

narratives.name: Social Media Regulatory Pressure
narratives.thesis: Social media platforms face increasing legal and regulatory pressure regarding content moderation and user safety, potentially impacting executive compensation and operational costs.
watchFor: Major legislative action on social media content or child safety
Significant fines or penalties imposed on platforms
User engagement declines due to platform changes

narratives.name: Capital Markets Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Capital markets firms are seeing activity from new IPOs and strategic initiatives, but broader market sentiment and analyst calls on unrelated sectors create a mixed picture.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in IPO activity
Increased market volatility impacting trading volumes
Major regulatory changes affecting investment banking

narratives.name: Household & Personal Products Momentum
narratives.thesis: Companies in the household and personal products segment are showing positive technical momentum, indicating investor confidence in their stability and growth prospects.
watchFor: Consumer spending on discretionary personal care items declines
Increased competition from private label brands
Supply chain disruptions impacting production costs

narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Software Infrastructure on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

Technology.thesis: The Technology sector remains broadly bullish, primarily driven by the ongoing AI infrastructure buildout and strong demand for AI-related hardware and software. Semiconductor companies are seeing significant tailwinds from increased memory and processing needs, while enterprise software firms are integrating AI to drive growth.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM — forces a hawkish Fed repricing, killing duration bid for software multiples
China export controls expand to HBM or advanced AI chips — significant headwind for semis

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: The Consumer Cyclical sector is showing mixed signals. While some areas like internet retail and auto manufacturers are seeing positive catalysts from new technologies and IPOs, apparel retail and restaurants face headwinds from changing consumer habits and economic pressures.
watchFor: Consumer Sentiment Index drops below 60 — signals significant discretionary spending pullback
Unemployment rate rises above 4.5% — impacts consumer purchasing power
Core PCE inflation accelerates above 0.3% MoM — leads to tighter monetary policy and reduced spending

Communication Services.thesis: The Communication Services sector is mixed. While some internet content and information companies are benefiting from AI integration and strategic partnerships, others face challenges from evolving consumer behavior and competitive pressures.
watchFor: Digital advertising spending slows significantly
Major streaming service reports subscriber losses
Increased regulatory action against social media platforms

Industrials.thesis: The Industrials sector is mixed, with Aerospace & Defense benefiting from geopolitical tensions, while Integrated Freight & Logistics faces challenges from potential acquisitions and valuation concerns. Farm & Heavy Construction Machinery shows a divergence between strong construction and weak agricultural demand.
watchFor: De-escalation of geopolitical conflicts — reduces defense spending outlook
Global trade volumes decline — impacts freight and logistics
Interest rates rise significantly — dampens construction activity

Healthcare.thesis: The Healthcare sector is bullish, primarily driven by the expanding GLP-1 obesity drug market and strategic advancements in medical devices. Drug manufacturers are seeing strong growth from new indications and market penetration, while medical device companies are innovating to capture new opportunities.
watchFor: New GLP-1 competitors emerge with superior efficacy/safety profiles
Increased regulatory scrutiny on drug pricing
Healthcare policy changes impacting insurance coverage for new treatments

Financials.thesis: The Financials sector is mixed. Credit Services and Capital Markets are showing strength from strategic expansions and positive analyst sentiment, while Diversified Banks are navigating AI integration and regulatory hurdles. Overall, the sector is adapting to technological shifts and a dynamic regulatory environment.
watchFor: Fed signals higher-for-longer interest rates — impacts lending profitability
Significant increase in loan defaults — signals economic stress
New financial regulations impacting bank profitability

Consumer Defensive.thesis: The Consumer Defensive sector is mixed. Discount stores are navigating supply chain optimizations and consumer sentiment shifts, while household and personal products companies are showing technical strength. The sector is generally resilient but faces pressures from inflation and evolving consumer behaviors.
watchFor: Consumer spending on staples declines significantly
Inflationary pressures ease substantially — reduces cost pressures
Major discount retailers report weaker-than-expected sales

Utilities.thesis: The Utilities sector, particularly independent power producers, is experiencing bullish sentiment driven by strategic investments in energy infrastructure and positive analyst outlooks, especially for companies involved in next-generation power solutions.
watchFor: Unexpected regulatory changes impacting energy markets
Significant increase in interest rates — raises cost of capital for projects
Slowdown in energy demand growth

Basic Materials.thesis: The Basic Materials sector, specifically industrial metals and mining, is navigating geopolitical influences and strategic partnerships. While some companies are seeing positive analyst coverage, broader concerns about rare earth elements and market dynamics create a neutral outlook.
watchFor: Escalation of trade tensions impacting raw material supply
Global industrial production slows significantly
Major shifts in commodity prices

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are experiencing a bullish phase, primarily driven by hopes of de-escalation in geopolitical conflicts and a search for safe-haven assets. Gold is shining due to market optimism, while silver is being reassessed after a significant price drop.
watchFor: Significant rise in real interest rates — reduces appeal of non-yielding assets
Stronger-than-expected economic growth — shifts funds to riskier assets
Sustained strengthening of the US Dollar — makes gold more expensive for international buyers
